entities.comment: Stores the physical shipping/billing address linked one-to-one with a user account.

fields.name: street
fields.comment: Street line including house number.

fields.name: city
fields.comment: City or town name.

fields.name: state
fields.comment: State or province name.

fields.name: postalCode
fields.comment: ZIP or postal code for the address.

fields.name: country
fields.comment: ISO 3166-1 country name or code.

metadata.module.name: CUSTOMER
metadata.domain.name: CUSTOMER
metadata.purpose.value: Stores user shipping and billing addresses
metadata.purpose.description: One-to-one with User; used during order fulfilment
metadata.pii: Contains physical home or billing address
metadata.dataQuality.rules: street, city, postalCode, and country must not be null

entities.comment: Organises products into a self-referencing hierarchy of categories and sub-categories.

fields.name: name
fields.comment: Unique display name of the category as shown in the storefront navigation.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Category name lookup for storefront navigation and admin search

fields.name: description
fields.comment: Optional long-form description shown on the category landing page.

metadata.module.name: PRODUCT
metadata.domain.name: INVENTORY
metadata.purpose.description: Self-referencing tree used for storefront navigation and product classification
metadata.criticality.description: Drives navigation UX; errors cause misclassification but not transaction failures
metadata.dataClassification.description: Category names and descriptions are publicly displayed
metadata.retention.description: Categories retained as long as products reference them
metadata.dataQuality.rules: name must be unique, circular parent references must not be allowed

entities.comment: Records every customer order placed through the storefront, tracking status from placement through delivery.

fields.name: orderNumber
fields.comment: Human-readable unique reference printed on receipts and confirmation emails.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Receipt lookup and customer service reference

fields.name: status
fields.comment: Lifecycle state: PENDING → CONFIRMED → SHIPPED → DELIVERED, or CANCELLED.

fields.name: totalAmount
fields.comment: Sum of all line totals after discounts, before tax.

fields.name: placedAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the customer submitted the order. Immutable after creation.

fields.name: shippedAt
fields.comment: Populated when the order transitions to SHIPPED status.

fields.name: deliveredAt
fields.comment: Populated when the carrier confirms delivery.

metadata.remarks: Orders are append-only once placed. Status updates are the only permitted mutations.
metadata.module.name: ORDER
metadata.domain.name: ORDERS
metadata.purpose.description: Central transactional record linking users, products, payments, and shipments
metadata.criticality.description: Core revenue-generating entity — must never be deleted
metadata.lawfulBasis.description: Processing required to fulfil purchase contract
metadata.legalHold: Potential subject to litigation or audit; must not be purged
metadata.retention.description: Financial records retained for 7 years per legal requirement
metadata.dataQuality.rules: orderNumber must be unique, totalAmount must be >= 0, status transitions must follow defined lifecycle

entities.comment: Represents a discount coupon applied to a specific order, including percentage off and maximum discount cap.

fields.name: code
fields.comment: Unique promo code string entered by the customer at checkout.

fields.name: discountPercent
fields.comment: Discount expressed as a percentage (e.g. 15.00 = 15%).

fields.name: maxDiscountAmount
fields.comment: Hard cap on the monetary saving; the actual discount never exceeds this value.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.comment: Timestamp after which the coupon can no longer be redeemed.

fields.name: active
fields.comment: False when the coupon has been manually deactivated before its expiry date.

metadata.remarks: A coupon belongs to one order. One order may have at most one coupon applied.
metadata.module.name: ORDER
metadata.module.description: Coupon and promotion management within orders
metadata.domain.name: ORDERS
metadata.purpose.value: Records promotional coupons applied to orders
metadata.purpose.description: Tracks discount codes, eligibility rules, and financial impact
metadata.criticality.description: Financial impact on revenue; misuse can cause revenue leakage
metadata.lawfulBasis.description: Applied as part of purchase transaction
metadata.retention.description: Retained with parent order for financial audit
metadata.dataQuality.rules: code must be unique, discountPercent must be between 0 and 100, maxDiscountAmount must be > 0

entities.comment: Each row is a single line item within an order, capturing the product, quantity, unit price, and computed line total.

fields.name: quantity
fields.comment: Number of units of the product purchased in this line item.

fields.name: unitPrice
fields.comment: Price per unit at the time the order was placed; snapshot to avoid drift if the product price changes later.

fields.name: lineTotal
fields.comment: Computed as quantity × unitPrice. Stored for fast reporting without recalculation.

metadata.remarks: unitPrice is a snapshot of the product price at order time — not the live catalogue price.
metadata.module.name: ORDER
metadata.domain.name: ORDERS
metadata.purpose.value: Stores individual product lines within an order
metadata.purpose.description: Child of Order; drives revenue calculations and inventory deduction
metadata.criticality.description: Drives revenue reporting and inventory management
metadata.retention.description: Retained with parent order for financial compliance
metadata.dataQuality.rules: quantity must be > 0, lineTotal must equal quantity * unitPrice, unitPrice must be snapshotted at order time

entities.comment: Tracks the shipment details for an order, including carrier, tracking number, and estimated/actual delivery timestamps.

fields.name: trackingNumber
fields.comment: Carrier-issued tracking number; can be used to deep-link to the carrier tracking page.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Shipment tracking lookup by customer and support agents

fields.name: trackingSerial
fields.comment: Carrier-issued tracking number; can be used to deep-link to the carrier tracking page.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Shipment tracking lookup by customer and support agents

fields.name: carrier
fields.comment: Shipping carrier responsible for delivery: UPS, FEDEX, DHL, USPS, or LOCAL courier.

fields.name: shippedAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the shipment was dispatched by the warehouse.

fields.name: estimatedDelivery
fields.comment: Carrier's estimated delivery window; null if not yet provided.

fields.name: deliveredAt
fields.comment: Actual delivery timestamp confirmed by the carrier; null until delivered.

fields.name: notes
fields.comment: Free-text field for internal handling notes or special delivery instructions.

metadata.module.name: SHIPPING
metadata.domain.name: LOGISTICS
metadata.purpose.value: Records carrier and tracking data for a fulfilled order
metadata.purpose.description: One-to-one with Order once it reaches SHIPPED status
metadata.criticality.description: Customer-facing; delays or errors directly impact satisfaction
metadata.dataQuality.rules: trackingNumber must be unique, carrier must not be null, shippedAt must be set before deliveredAt

entities.comment: Catalogue of all products available for purchase, including pricing, stock level, and availability flag.

fields.name: name
fields.comment: Display name of the product as shown in the storefront.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Full-text product search in the storefront

fields.name: uniqueID
fields.comment: Internal unique SKU or product identifier used for catalogue management.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: SKU-based lookup in warehouse and order processing systems

fields.name: description
fields.comment: Long-form marketing description shown on the product detail page; supports plain text.

fields.name: price
fields.comment: Retail selling price of the product in the default currency.

metadata.dataClassification.description: Pricing data — not publicly queryable via raw API

fields.name: stockQuantity
fields.comment: Current units in stock. Decremented on order placement; incremented on restock.

fields.name: available
fields.comment: False hides the product from the storefront without deleting it.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the product was first added to the catalogue.

metadata.module.name: PRODUCT
metadata.domain.name: INVENTORY
metadata.purpose.value: Defines sellable products in the catalogue
metadata.purpose.description: Master product record; drives storefront display, pricing, and inventory tracking
metadata.criticality.description: Revenue-generating master data; must be accurate and available at all times
metadata.retention.description: Product records retained indefinitely for historical order references
metadata.dataQuality.rules: name must not be null, price must be > 0, uniqueID must be unique, stockQuantity must be >= 0

entities.comment: Defines time-bounded promotional discounts (percentage or fixed amount) that can be applied to a product.

fields.name: label
fields.comment: Internal display name for the promotion, e.g. 'Summer Sale 20%'.

fields.name: discountType
fields.comment: PERCENTAGE applies value as a % off; FIXED_AMOUNT deducts a flat currency value.

fields.name: value
fields.comment: The discount magnitude — percentage points or currency amount depending on discountType.

fields.name: startsAt
fields.comment: Discount becomes active at this timestamp; purchases before this time are not discounted.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Active promotion window query (startsAt <= NOW <= endsAt)

fields.name: endsAt
fields.comment: Discount expires at this timestamp; no new orders can use it after this point.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Active promotion window query (startsAt <= NOW <= endsAt)

fields.name: active
fields.comment: Allows manual early deactivation of the promotion without deleting the record.

metadata.remarks: Only one active discount per product should be active at any given time — enforced at application level.
metadata.module.name: PRODUCT
metadata.domain.name: INVENTORY
metadata.purpose.value: Stores time-limited promotional discounts for products
metadata.purpose.description: Drives discounted pricing on the storefront within defined validity windows
metadata.criticality.description: Incorrect discounts directly impact revenue and customer trust
metadata.retention.description: Retained for marketing analysis and audit
metadata.dataQuality.rules: startsAt must be before endsAt, value must be > 0, PERCENTAGE value must be between 0 and 100

entities.comment: Holds image URLs and metadata for product photos, supporting multiple images per product with sort order and a primary flag.

fields.name: url
fields.comment: HTTPS URL pointing to the hosted product image asset.

fields.name: altText
fields.comment: Accessibility alt-text for the image; displayed when image cannot load and read by screen readers.

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.comment: Display order position; lower values appear first in image galleries.

fields.name: primary
fields.comment: Marks the hero/primary image shown in listing views. Only one image per product should be true.

metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Primary image lookup for product listing pages

fields.name: uploadedAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the image was uploaded. Immutable.

metadata.module.name: PRODUCT
metadata.domain.name: INVENTORY
metadata.purpose.value: Stores image URLs and display metadata for product photos
metadata.purpose.description: Supports multiple images per product with ordering and primary designation
metadata.criticality.description: Impacts storefront UX but not transactional integrity
metadata.dataClassification.description: Image URLs are publicly served on the storefront
metadata.retention.description: Retained as long as product exists
metadata.dataQuality.rules: url must be a valid HTTPS URL, sortOrder must be >= 0, only one image per product may have primary = true

entities.comment: Customer-submitted product reviews with a 1–5 star rating, optional title, and free-text body.

fields.name: rating
fields.comment: Star rating given by the customer; must be an integer between 1 and 5.

fields.name: title
fields.comment: Optional short headline for the review, e.g. 'Great quality!'

fields.name: body
fields.comment: Full review text written by the customer. May contain personal opinions or incidental PII.

metadata.pii: Free-text — may contain user-submitted personal data

fields.name: createdAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the review was submitted. Immutable.

metadata.remarks: Review body must be moderated for harmful content before being surfaced publicly.
metadata.module.name: PRODUCT
metadata.domain.name: CUSTOMER
metadata.purpose.value: Stores customer reviews and star ratings for products
metadata.purpose.description: User-generated content; drives product credibility and purchase decisions
metadata.criticality.description: Impacts conversion rate; free-text may contain PII or harmful content
metadata.dataClassification.description: User content — moderated before public display
metadata.pii: Free-text body field may contain personal information submitted by users
metadata.consentRequired: User consent obtained at time of review submission
metadata.retention.description: Retained for 3 years or until user requests deletion
metadata.dataQuality.rules: rating must be between 1 and 5, body must be moderated before display

entities.comment: Registered user accounts including authentication credentials, personal details, and account status.

fields.name: email
fields.comment: Primary email address used for login and communications.

metadata.pii: Direct identifier — uniquely identifies the person
metadata.indexedFor.purpose: Login lookup and unique constraint enforcement

fields.name: firstName
fields.comment: Customer's given (first) name.

fields.name: lastName
fields.comment: Customer's family (last) name.

fields.name: passwordHash
fields.comment: Bcrypt-hashed user password. Never store or log the plain-text value.

metadata.remarks: Must always be stored as a bcrypt hash with cost factor ≥ 12.

fields.name: active
fields.comment: Whether the account is enabled. False = soft-deleted or suspended.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the account was created. Immutable after insert.

metadata.remarks: Password is stored as a bcrypt hash. Never log or expose raw credentials.
metadata.module.name: CUSTOMER
metadata.domain.name: CUSTOMER
metadata.purpose.description: Primary customer master record for identity, auth, and profile data
metadata.criticality.description: Central entity referenced by orders, reviews, sessions, and notifications
metadata.tableType.description: Master data — one row per registered user
metadata.pii: Contains name, email, and hashed credentials
metadata.lawfulBasis.description: Processing necessary to fulfil user account contract
metadata.retention.description: Retained for legal and audit obligations
metadata.dataQuality.rules: email must be unique and non-null, passwordHash must never be stored in plain text

entities.comment: In-app notifications sent to users for order updates, promotions, system alerts, and review replies.

fields.name: type
fields.comment: Category of the notification — drives the icon and routing in the UI.

fields.name: title
fields.comment: Short notification title shown in the notification badge/list.

fields.name: message
fields.comment: Full notification body text presented when the user opens the notification.

fields.name: read
fields.comment: Whether the user has opened/acknowledged the notification.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the notification was created and delivered. Immutable after insert.

fields.name: readAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the user first read the notification. Null if unread.

metadata.module.name: NOTIFICATION
metadata.domain.name: CUSTOMER
metadata.purpose.description: Records per-user notification events including type, content, read status, and delivery time
metadata.criticality.description: Notification delivery failures are non-blocking; no transaction impact
metadata.dataClassification.description: Internal user communication data; not publicly exposed
metadata.lawfulBasis.description: Notifications are part of the service contract with the user
metadata.retention.description: Notifications retained for one year then purged
metadata.dataQuality.rules: title and message must not be null, readAt must be null or after createdAt, type must be a valid NotificationType

entities.comment: Tracks active and historical login sessions per user, storing the auth token, client IP, user-agent, and expiry time.

fields.name: token
fields.comment: Opaque bearer token used to authenticate the session. Stored as a hash in production.

fields.name: ipAddress
fields.comment: Client IP address at the time of login. Used for anomaly detection.

metadata.pii: IP address can identify an individual

fields.name: userAgent
fields.comment: HTTP User-Agent string of the client browser or app.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the session was created. Immutable after insert.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.comment: Timestamp after which the session token is no longer valid.

fields.name: revokedAt
fields.comment: Timestamp when the session was explicitly revoked (logout or forced expiry). Null if still active.

metadata.remarks: Tokens must be generated with a cryptographically secure random source. Never log raw token values.
metadata.module.name: AUTH
metadata.domain.name: SECURITY
metadata.purpose.description: Records per-session auth tokens, expiry, and client metadata for authentication and audit purposes
metadata.criticality.description: Compromised sessions allow account takeover; must be tightly controlled
metadata.dataClassification.description: Contains auth tokens and client IP addresses
metadata.pii: Contains IP address which may identify an individual
metadata.lawfulBasis.description: Processing necessary to maintain authenticated user sessions
metadata.retention.description: Expired and revoked sessions purged after one year for audit trail
metadata.dataQuality.rules: token must be unique and non-null, expiresAt must be after createdAt, revokedAt must be null or after createdAt
